title: MIRRORVANA Fogless Shower & Shaving Mirror with Upgraded Suction Mount for Bathroom, Anti Fog & Mist Free Shatterproof Surface and 360° Swivel, 16cm x 16cm (1X Magnification)
features: #1 - FOG RESISTANT COATING FOR SHAVING IN THE FOG: Your new Mirrorvana shower shaving mirror is treated with a FOG RESISTANT COATING** giving you that perfect fog free shaving experience. **IMPORTANT: Respraying with the "MIRRORVANA ANTIFOG SPRAY" (included with purchases in UK) is required from time to time to replenish the initial coating.

#2 - UPGRADED SUCTION CUP SO YOU CAN INSTALL IN SECONDS: Simply place the suction cup against any SMOOTH, FLAT and NON-POROUS surface like a bathroom mirror or bathroom tile to lock the suction in place. Our suction cup is now upgraded with a STICKY texture so it's compatible with even more surfaces like enamel, marble, acrylic, glass, ceramic and porcelain!

#3 - AWESOME GIFT IDEA FOR HIM: Your brother, father, son, husband, boyfriend, guy friend, best friend or just YOU will LOVE this essential shower accessory tool! Perfect present for special occasions like X-Mas, birthdays and Father's Day.

#4 - LIGHT AND COMPACT making it super convenient for travel. Your mirror is also SHATTERPROOF which means you'll never have to deal with broken glass and risk accidentally hurting yourself in the shower.

★ BONUS ANTI-FOG SPRAY ★ Purchases in UK now ship with a FREE bonus bottle of our anti-fog spray to replenish the initial fogless coating. For other shower mirrors with heat transfer anti-fog design, check out our storefront by clicking on our brand name "Mirrorvana" above!
description: Product Description Can I really expect a fog-free experience? Absolutely! Your new mirror is pretreated with a special antifog coating that keeps it clear, even when your shower gets steamy. Now, you can shave in the shower without any interruptions. What should I do with the antifog spray included in the package? When the initial anti-fog coating wears off (when your mirror gets foggy), use the anti-fog spray to replenish it. Simply spray 4-6 times (no need to wipe), let it air-dry, and your mirror will be fog-free again. Reapply every few weeks. Any other shower mirrors to choose from? Yes, you'll find few options below. We offer mirrors with antifog coating, hot water reservoir, or a combination of these. Installation options include adhesive, lock suction, classic suction, or hanging. Most are available in various colors. I'm looking for a different shower mirror that stays fog-free without occasional spraying. Do you offer such mirrors? Certainly! We call them heated shower mirrors. They have a built-in hot water reservoir. Pour hot water into it, and the mirror stays fog-free as long as the water is warm. Search for "Mirrorvana shower mirrors" to check them out!
